description: Marketing meeting prep agent for NorthStar Health. Reads the signed-in user's upcoming calendar meetings through WorkIQ and prepares a grounded briefing by pulling relevant product details, market insights and persona profiles from the marketing toolbox.

skills.name: Meeting Briefing
skills.description: Read an upcoming meeting's title, agenda and attendees from the user's calendar (WorkIQ) and assemble a decision-ready briefing grounded in product, market and persona data.

skills.name: Calendar Lookup
skills.description: Find the next meeting or a meeting on a given day from the signed-in user's Microsoft 365 calendar and extract its topic, agenda and participants.
